memory.summary: My team needs me more than this quick win or leisure, so I'll skip them to start the term project immediately.

desires: Ensure my teammates (teammate_A) feel supported and not abandoned by the project's early momentum, as our relationship trust is my highest priority.
Protect my long-term physical stamina and sleep discipline to prevent the current 2-hour sleep debt from escalating into a crisis that would damage my reliability with the cohort_3 group.
Secure a renegotiated boundary with my professor regarding the term project timeline to ensure I can deliver high-quality work without compromising my health or team cohesion.

goals.description: Initiate a direct conversation with teammate_A to reaffirm commitment and share the initial project vision, ensuring they feel supported before we tackle the heavy lifting.
goals.rationale: My core value is relationships (0.5). With trust at 6/7 for my cohort and teammate_A, I must proactively manage this bond. The project is barely started; if I don't anchor the relationship now, the future payoff of the team's success will be compromised. This aligns with my assertive/deliberate nature: setting the tone early prevents future conflict.

goals.description: Execute the 'quick_chore' immediately to clear mental clutter and create a psychological win before engaging in deeper work or planning.
goals.rationale: While relationships are paramount, I am deliberate. A small, completed task clears the path for the complex renegotiation with the professor later. It respects my sleep discipline by keeping the afternoon efficient rather than dragging out trivialities.

goals.description: Draft a boundary proposal for the professor regarding the term project timeline, explicitly linking the request to the need for high-quality output and team health.
goals.rationale: I have a long planning horizon. The deadline is Thursday, but starting late requires a strategic shift. I cannot deliver quality work without protecting my stamina (currently low due to 2h sleep debt) and my team's cohesion. I will draft this after the quick chore to ensure I approach the professor with a clear, structured argument rather than reacting emotionally.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1 (Relationships priority 0.5) by proactively anchoring trust with teammate_A. As an assertive/deliberate person, I set the tone early to prevent future conflict. This protects the long-term team payoff over immediate task progress.

action.name: message

args.content: Hey, I want to reconnect and share my initial vision for our term project. Let's talk soon so we're aligned before the heavy lifting starts.
